steps.t: The festival steeds can be found spoiling for the race in the stable at the Bree-fields Festival Grounds. You should mount a steed to begin the race -…
The gates can be found by following the race-track at the Bree-fields' Festival Ground. You must race through all the gates before the timer runs out.

The finish line is near! You must cross the finish line before the time runs out.
Sally Threshing stands next to the finish line at the race-track in Bree. You should speak with Sally Threshing and inform her of your success.
